title: Reward.io
description: An iOS app for managing and tracking rewards, incentives, and achievements. Built with Swift and SwiftUI for a native iOS experience.

title: Scribble.io
description: A creative iOS app for quick notes, sketches, and ideas. Designed for seamless capture and organization of your thoughts on the go.

title: Real-time Data Pipeline
description: Designed and implemented a high-throughput data pipeline processing millions of events daily using Apache Spark, Kafka, and Debezium CDC.

title: Modern Data Platform
description: Built a comprehensive data platform supporting ingestion, governance, and analytics for a team of data scientists and analysts.

title: ML Model Pipeline
description: Delivered high-quality datasets powering production ML models for fraud detection, personalization, and customer LTV prediction.
